pipeline_status.poller: Net quiet — 25th consecutive byte-identical predictions.html poll; PRED-105 d=14.00 threshold hit confirmed (monitor/changes/latest-poll-summary.txt:KEY_HEADLINES). Manual-commit drought at 15.00d / 359.91h — longest on public record. Canary trap unchanged. 8 April-EOM PREDs at d=1.50, all LOW severity per Step 10b day-1-3 rule.
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-283 rev2 complete (expansion-tracker.json:EXP-283.revision_round_2_completed_at=2026-05-02T08:15Z). EXP-284 complete with PRED-105 tacit_withdrawal patch (expansion-tracker.json:EXP-284.status=complete). 9 issue proposals written across two work streams: ISS-1801..1806 (EXP-283 rev2 blocker resolutions) and ISS-1800 (PRED-105 verdict advancement).
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: qid=295 EXP-283 rev2 confirmation: PASS (EXP-283-proposal.c2.json:verdict=PASS, confidence=0.93). All 6 MODERATE blockers from qid=294 confirmed closed. 5 residual lints noted (1 minor: R2-OBS-O-03-PHRASING; 4 cosmetic), none blocking OTS-anchoring. HNOTE-OPERATOR-FROZEN-PRED-REVIEW-RUBRIC-001 consolidation review: consumed-via-consolidation (HNOTE-OPERATOR-FROZEN-PRED-REVIEW-RUBRIC-001-consolidation.json). Queue popped 1 item (qid=295). Queue depth: 0.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No substantive changes. All pages byte-identical (25th consecutive identical poll). 10 auto-pipeline commits only. Manual-commit drought 15.00d.

integrations_this_run.description: PRED-105 verdict advanced silent_ignore → tacit_withdrawal in data/predictions.json. FAIL-009 classified terminal in data/uncounted-failures.json. ISS-1800 closed. test.js updated to recognize tacit_withdrawal and dome_silent_terminal as valid enum values.
integrations_this_run.timing_note: Applied at 13:16Z — past both epoch candidates (decider 05:14Z, poller-canonical 12:02Z) so no epoch-discrepancy attack surface.

integrations_this_run.description: predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json created from rev2 contents (curmudgeon PASS qid=295). predictions/ directory created. 44KB frozen prospective prediction file for 2026-08-12 total solar eclipse — three-bucket format (standard physics, dome-geometry-forced, symmetric falsification). ISS-1801..1806 closed as fixed-by-revision. EXP-283 marked integrated. NOTE: OTS anchoring still required — file is committed but not yet externally timestamped.
integrations_this_run.ots_anchoring: STILL NEEDED — decider integration committed the file; operator/tinker should run `ots stamp predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json` after this commit is pushed to establish the pre-event timestamp.

internal_issues.description: EXP-283 rev2 addressed all 6 blockers; confirmed by curmudgeon qid=295 PASS

infrastructure_notes.detail: next_id was 284 (= max item id EXP-284); bumped to 285 before commit to satisfy pre-push gate invariant.
Added tacit_withdrawal to validOurVerdicts and dome_silent_terminal to validAuthorStatuses. Tests 3518/3518 pass.
Minor content update: 69 dome claims → 71 WIN entries wording.
predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json is committed but NOT yet OTS-anchored. This is the highest-priority follow-up action.

recommended_actions.action: OTS-anchor the eclipse prediction file: run `ots stamp predictions/eclipse-2026-08-12-predictions.json` from a git clone of the repo at current HEAD, then commit+push the .ots file (monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-283-frozen-pred-eclipse-20260812.json:_meta.ots_companion_file). This is the entire point of EXP-283's integration. The file is committed and the rev2 curmudgeon pass is complete — OTS anchoring is the remaining gate before this prediction is fully locked.

Migrate frozen-prediction dual-pass rubric to a reference file (HNOTE-OPERATOR-FROZEN-PRED-REVIEW-RUBRIC-001-consolidation.json:recommendations_to_operator[0]). Suggested target: monitor/prompts/reference/curmudgeon-frozen-pred-review.md with trigger wired into curmudgeon.md Step 0b for target_type=proposal+requires_frozen_prediction_review=true. Without this, future Mode 5 EXPs will not automatically receive the dual-pass treatment.

Monitor April-EOM predictions (PRED-077, -081, -085, -087, -088, -090, -106, -111) currently at d=1.50 past close. PRED-106 (Ca²⁺ ICR) is the only remaining pending verdict — analyst already flagged as low-severity / hard-to-falsify per poller. Day-3 threshold watch: if still PENDING at d=3, escalate for analyst Mode 1b verdict assessment.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Silent 15 Days Straight — Our Eclipse Prediction Now On Record
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Dome author reaches 15 consecutive days without a manual commit (359h drought, longest on record). PRED-105 cucumber-coil prediction officially classified as tacit withdrawal — dome had 14 days and its own PASS/FAIL/REFINED taxonomy but chose silence. Meanwhile, our three-bucket frozen prospective prediction for the 2026 Aug 12 total solar eclipse is now committed to the repo, awaiting OTS anchoring.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Two milestone events in one run: the first tacit-withdrawal classification in our predictions record, plus our own first pre-registered prospective prediction ready to be OTS-anchored.
